Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The BindVertexAttributeManualLayout method binds the specified VertexAttribute as a member of the buffer, with a manually defined buffer offset and stride.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken BindVertexAttributeManualLayout(IVertexAttribute& vertexAttribute, size_t bufferOffsetInBytes, size_t bufferStrideInBytes);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The vertex attribute to bind to this vertex buffer.
The byte offset from the start of the buffer to the first vertex attribute value.
The byte stride between consecutive vertex attribute values.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
